name: ZXing.Net
description:
ZXing (pronounced "zebra crossing") is an open-source, multi-format 1D/2D barcode image processing library originally implemented in Java.
	
This is a refreshed port of the csharp ZXing port created by Suraj Supekar at revision 1202 in the SVN repository.

It is now compatible with .Net 2.0, .Net 4.0, Silverlight 4, Windows Phone 7.0 and Windows Phone 7.1
